response.global_analysis: The video consists of a high-energy medley. The first segment (00:00-03:38) features a cover of 'Sakuranbo' with an instrumental backing that references 'Usatei'. The second segment (03:39-05:00) is the song 'Ichigo' (Strawberry), confirmed by on-screen lyrics. I have transcribed the vocals for the first part and followed the on-screen text for the second part where available, ensuring timing matches the audio cues exactly. Unused lyrics from the reference context are discarded as the video ends.

subtitles.original: そっぽ向くふりはやだよ
subtitles.english: I hate pretending to look away.

subtitles.original: なにげなく ふわっと
subtitles.english: Casually, lightly,

subtitles.original: 手を取り回して 瞳近づく
subtitles.english: taking hands, spinning, eyes getting closer.

subtitles.original: ホントはね... ずっと好きだったの 内緒だよ
subtitles.english: Actually... I've always loved you. It's a secret.

subtitles.original: イェーイ！
subtitles.english: Yay!

subtitles.original: あーれれ 小さな胸が震えてる
subtitles.english: Oh? My small chest is trembling.

subtitles.original: 抱きしめられたら 壊れちゃうよ
subtitles.english: If you hug me, I might break.

subtitles.original: 夢で見ていたのより 切ないね
subtitles.english: It's more painful than what I saw in my dreams.

subtitles.original: だからもっと ギュッとしてね
subtitles.english: So please, hold me tighter.

subtitles.original: ポロリ はじけたから 涙あふれちゃう
subtitles.english: Because it popped, tears overflow.

subtitles.original: 大人になるための 痛みかな
subtitles.english: Is this the pain of growing up?

subtitles.original: 君に触れられた頬 染まってく
subtitles.english: The cheek you touched is turning red.

subtitles.original: キスはちょっとだけ待ってね
subtitles.english: Wait just a little bit for a kiss.

subtitles.original: 好き好き好き 好き好き好き 好き好き好き
subtitles.english: Love, love, love... Love, love, love...

subtitles.original: 好き好き好き 好き好き好き 好き好き好き
subtitles.english: Love, love, love... Love, love, love...

subtitles.original: やだやだ やだよ～ 初心は嫌だ
subtitles.english: No way, no way... I don't want to be a beginner.

subtitles.original: もっとギュッとしていて
subtitles.english: Hold me tighter.

subtitles.original: はなはなはなはな 私もまだ
subtitles.english: Hana hana hana hana... I'm still...

subtitles.original: 根性もだもん
subtitles.english: still have guts!

subtitles.original: 君の余裕がグサッと
subtitles.english: Your composure stabs me,

subtitles.original: 胸の奥に刺さるよ
subtitles.english: piercing deep into my heart.

subtitles.original: この私 スパッと 忘れさせてね
subtitles.english: Let me forget this... cleanly,

subtitles.original: 優しいキスで
subtitles.english: with a gentle kiss.

subtitles.original: なんだかね... キュンとしちゃうの
subtitles.english: Somehow... my heart skips a beat.

subtitles.original: 内緒だよ
subtitles.english: It's a secret.

subtitles.original: イェーイ！
subtitles.english: Yay!

subtitles.original: あーれれ 唇があふれてる
subtitles.english: Oh? Lips are tingling.

subtitles.original: 君のまつげが瞳に映る
subtitles.english: Your eyelashes reflect in my eyes.

subtitles.original: 鼓動波打つ速さ 急上昇
subtitles.english: The speed of my heartbeat surges.

subtitles.original: だけどちょっと かなり幸せ
subtitles.english: But I'm quite happy.

subtitles.original: 小鳥たちも止まる 瞬間に
subtitles.english: In the moment even birds stop,

subtitles.original: 壊れそうな心 溶けだす
subtitles.english: my heart that seems about to break melts.

subtitles.original: 赤くはじけた私 さくらんぼ
subtitles.english: Popped red, I am a cherry.

subtitles.original: 君とずっと つながっていたい
subtitles.english: I want to stay connected with you forever.

subtitles.original: あぁ 神様 この唇は
subtitles.english: Ah, God, these lips...

subtitles.original: 彼と誓うために 生まれてきたのですね
subtitles.english: were born to make a vow with him, weren't they?

subtitles.original: うー、っぴー！
subtitles.english: Woo-pee!

subtitles.original: すまし顔で決めて
subtitles.english: Decide with a serious face,

subtitles.original: そっぽ向くふりはやだよ
subtitles.english: I hate pretending to look away.

subtitles.original: なにげなく ふわっと
subtitles.english: Casually, lightly,

subtitles.original: 手を取り回して 瞳近づく
subtitles.english: taking hands, spinning, eyes getting closer.

subtitles.original: だってね こんなの初めてなの
subtitles.english: Because, you see, this is the first time.

subtitles.original: 内緒だよ
subtitles.english: It's a secret.

subtitles.original: いっせーのーで！
subtitles.english: One, two...!

subtitles.original: あーれれ おかしなこのドキドキは
subtitles.english: Oh? This strange pounding heartbeat...

subtitles.original: 君の腕の中で あふれだす
subtitles.english: overflows in your arms.

subtitles.original: ポロリ こぼれた涙 さくらんぼ
subtitles.english: Tears that spilled, cherry.

subtitles.original: もっとギュッと ずっとそばにいて
subtitles.english: Hold me tighter, stay by my side forever.

subtitles.original: あーれれ 世界がくるり回りだす
subtitles.english: Oh? The world starts spinning around.

subtitles.original: ふわふわ夢心地 風まかせ
subtitles.english: Fluffy dreamlike feeling, at the mercy of the wind.

subtitles.original: ずっと待ってた恋は止まらない
subtitles.english: The love I've been waiting for won't stop.

subtitles.original: だからずっと 離さないで
subtitles.english: So please, never let go.

subtitles.original: 好き好き好き 好き好き好き...
subtitles.english: Love, love, love... Love, love, love...

subtitles.original: みんなー！周防パトラ生誕祭盛り上げてくれてどうもありがとう！
subtitles.english: Everyone! Thank you so much for livening up Suou Patra's birthday festival!

subtitles.original: まだまだ歌っちゃうから盛り上げよろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: I'm going to keep singing, so please keep the excitement going!

subtitles.original: 偉大なる悪魔は実は大天使パトラちゃん様なのだー！
subtitles.english: The great demon is actually Archangel Patra-chan-sama!

subtitles.original: ピピピピ大魔王イチゴ 買って褒めて甘やかしてよ
subtitles.english: Pi-pi-pi-pi Great Demon King Ichigo. Buy, praise, and pamper me.

subtitles.original: 転んでしおしお泣いたって 戦わないモンスターに負けないで
subtitles.english: Even if I fall and cry salty tears, don't lose to monsters that don't fight.

subtitles.original: 君の運命は自分で切り開け
subtitles.english: Carve out your own destiny.

subtitles.original: 馬鹿って言うほうが馬鹿
subtitles.english: The one who calls others stupid is the stupid one.

subtitles.original: 超セクシーでキュートで断然サイコパスが
subtitles.english: Super sexy, cute, and definitely psychopathic,

subtitles.original: 日本レベル文化的な最低限のボン・ボヤージュ
subtitles.english: Japan-level cultural minimum bon voyage.

subtitles.original: It's my life!
subtitles.english: It's my life!

subtitles.original: ムニムニムニムニほっぺムニュ
subtitles.english: Muni-muni-muni-muni cheek squeeze.

subtitles.original: 様々この世に可愛いの いつから悪魔と錯覚していた？
subtitles.english: Various cute things in this world. Since when did you have the illusion that I was a demon?

subtitles.original: そうだそうだ 僕は大天使のような女の子
subtitles.english: That's right, that's right, I'm a girl like an archangel.

subtitles.original: 右に回れば太陽じゃない 地球が逆回転しちゃうじゃない
subtitles.english: Turning right isn't the sun. The Earth might rotate in reverse, wouldn't it?

subtitles.original: いいぜいいぜ いつも全部が いつも自分が主人公
subtitles.english: It's fine, it's fine, everything is always... I'm always the protagonist.

subtitles.original: あー なんか疲れちゃった 時代が追いつくまで待たなきゃ
subtitles.english: Ah, I'm kind of tired. Gotta wait until the era catches up.

subtitles.original: 今日も誕生日！
subtitles.english: Today is also my birthday!

subtitles.original: ちょっと待って よそ見してるのよ
subtitles.english: Wait a minute, you're looking away.

subtitles.original: こんなに大好きなのにどういうこと？
subtitles.english: I love you this much, so what's the deal?
